name: Cold Astolfo NTR
description:
Old friend spoil your girfriend heartlessly. Pretty open start.
Try to be as desperate to try to stop it and you still will fail miserably, i's more fun when you do something while your heart is broking.

You can live with her after as she grows to dislike and even be grossed out with you from how ruined she gets.
creator: ytekietyke
